zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Judsonne於1515年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可時，他的父親Robert Judsonne Sr.21歲，母親Margaret Clarke19歲。他於1543年1月27日與Eufemia Thorpe在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年1月27日在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Judsonne于1515年出生在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可时，他的父亲Robert Judsonne Sr.21岁，母亲Margaret Clarke19岁。他于1543年1月27日与Eufemia Thorpe在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1593年1月27日在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Judsonne was born in 1515, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Judsonne Sr., was 21 and his mother, Margaret Clarke, was 19. He married Eufemia Thorpe on 27 January 1543, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 27 January 1593, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Judsonne est né en 1515, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Judsonne Sr., avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Clarke, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Eufemia Thorpe le 27 janvier 1543, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1593, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Judsonne 1515 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Judsonne Sr. 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Clarke 19. Er hat am 27. Januar 1543 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Eufemia Thorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Januar 1593 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Judsonne è nato il nel 1515 nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Judsonne Sr., aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Clarke, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Eufemia Thorpe il 27 gennaio 1543, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 27 gennaio 1593, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Judsonneが1515年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスで生まれた時，父Robert Judsonne Sr.は21歳，母Margaret Clarkeは19歳であった。1543年1月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでEufemia Thorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年1月27日に故郷で78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Judsonne(이)가 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Judsonne Sr.(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Clarke(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1543년 1월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Eufemia Thorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 1월 27일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Judsonne nasceu em 1515, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Judsonne Sr., tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Clarke, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Eufemia Thorpe em 27 de janeiro de 1543, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1593, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Judsonne родился в 1515 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Judsonne Sr. было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Clarke, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Eufemia Thorpe 27 января 1543 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 27 января 1593 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Judsonne nació en 1515, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Judsonne Sr., tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Clarke, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Eufemia Thorpe el 27 de enero de 1543, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 27 de enero de 1593, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
